Finding / Nonconformity: Three joiner accounts were created without manager approval ticket
Root Cause: Onboarding checklist did not enforce approval gate
Correction (Immediate): Revoked accounts and recreated with approval
Corrective Action: Add mandatory approval gate in HR onboarding workflow + monthly reconciliation

Finding / Nonconformity: SoA did not cite justification for excluding A 8.34
Root Cause: Reviewer used prior-year SoA without re-check
Corrective Action: Require peer review of SoA before approval

Finding / Nonconformity: Phishing email bypassed filter; one user clicked link
Root Cause: Filter policy did not cover newly registered domains
Corrective Action: Enable newly-registered-domain rule in mail filter and run targeted awareness training

Finding / Nonconformity: Vulnerability remediation SLA breached for 4 high findings
Root Cause: Patch window too short; no escalation path
Corrective Action: Introduce monthly patch window + escalation to CTO after 25 days

Finding / Nonconformity: Customer reported unencrypted email attachment with contract
Root Cause: Staff used personal workaround after mail gateway issue
Correction (Immediate): Retrieved email and re-sent via secure portal
Corrective Action: Refresh training on Information Transfer Policy + block external attachments over 10MB
